variables.notes: Selected financing-related current debt labels and excluded lease liabilities. 'Liabilities to credit institutions' appears in both non-current and current sections across years; this row near current liabilities is the preferred short-term borrowing line. Overdraft/Overdraft facility are included as additional current debt components where reported. Avoided double counting with lease liabilities and non-debt payables.
